characters.name: Fire Mage
characters.passive: Ignited kills spread fire to neighbors.

spells.name: Ignite
spells.desc: Imbue: your next deflects set blocks alight, burning them over time. Fire spreads to neighbors.

spells.name: Conflagration
spells.desc: Detonate every burning block at once in a chain of fire — ignite the board first, then blow it all up.

spells.name: Fire Wall
spells.desc: Enchant the ball — its next block hit erupts into a wall of fire that spreads across the surrounding blocks, burning them over time.

spells.name: Turret
spells.desc: Mount a turret on the paddle that fires a bolt each time you catch the ball.

spells.name: Phoenix
spells.desc: Summon a phoenix that orbits the ball, scorching the blocks it sweeps past.

spells.name: Ashfall
spells.desc: For a few seconds, every burning block you destroy rains a vertical ember down its column, scorching the blocks below.

characters.name: Paladin
characters.passive: Once per level, a lost ball is saved.

spells.name: Shield
spells.desc: Conjure a barrier that reflects enemy bullets back up as your own bolts, turning their fire against the blocks.

spells.name: Spear
spells.desc: Hurl a spear of light that pierces straight through a column of blocks, damaging each one it passes.

spells.name: Holy Echo
spells.desc: Summon a temporary holy echo of your ball — lasts 8 seconds, deals reduced damage, and carries none of your ball's imbues.

spells.name: Duplicate
spells.desc: Split the ball into an extra copy for more board coverage.

spells.name: Penetration
spells.desc: Imbue: your next hits punch straight through blocks without bouncing.

spells.name: Last Day
spells.desc: Call down judgment, smiting the column where your ball strikes the ceiling.

spells.name: Reckoning
spells.desc: Arm a vengeance meter: every point of HP an enemy takes from you charges it, and when it fills it smites the board with judgment pillars.

spells.name: Lightning
spells.desc: Strike a block with lightning that chains to several nearby blocks.

spells.name: Rocket
spells.desc: Launch a homing rocket that seeks the nearest block and detonates, blasting it and everything around it.

spells.name: Containment Field
spells.desc: Project a field that suppresses enemy emitters caught inside it and melts the blocks within over time.

spells.name: Magnet
spells.desc: Magnetize the ball, steering it toward blocks for a few seconds.

spells.name: Overload
spells.desc: Plant a bomb-block that chain-detonates the blocks around it.

spells.name: Tesla Grid
spells.desc: Electrify the side walls: bounce off both and a horizontal lightning curtain arcs across the board, frying everything in its band.

spells.name: Rot & Collapse
spells.desc: Imbue: your next deflects ROT blocks — permanently lowering their max HP — and when a rotted block dies the blocks above it collapse down into the gap.

spells.name: Bonewalker
spells.desc: Summon a skeletal minion that walks the rooftops of the block field, meleeing whatever block it stands on as it strides across the top.

spells.name: Drain
spells.desc: For a time, each block you kill drains extra mana (souls) to you.

spells.name: Bone Golem
spells.desc: Summon a bone golem bodyguard that rises from the paddle and climbs a column, bulldozing its blocks while bodying enemy fire that would reach you — until it is soaked through.

spells.name: Lich's Gaze
spells.desc: Plant a slow lighthouse beam at the paddle that sweeps the board, cursing every block it crosses — cursed blocks take bonus damage from your ball.

spells.name: Raise
spells.desc: Summon a friendly skeleton helper-ball that bounces and breaks blocks alongside yours.

neutralSpells.name: Recall
neutralSpells.desc: Steers your balls back toward the paddle for a few seconds — a save when one is about to drop.

neutralSpells.name: Slow Time
neutralSpells.desc: Slows every ball for a few seconds, making tricky bounces easy to read and aim.
